## Summary

What changed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Registry item
- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Registry Checklist

For registry item PRs:

- [ ] I added or updated files under `registry/skills`, `registry/rules`, or `registry/modes`.
- [ ] The item has a `bobster.json` manifest.
- [ ] The manifest `files` list matches the files in the item folder.
- [ ] The content does not include secrets, credentials, private URLs, or local machine details.
- [ ] I ran `npm run registry:prepare`, or I am leaving generated index updates to maintainers.

## Testing

What did you run, if anything?
